## Description

<!-- What does this PR do? Reference any issues with "Fixes #123". -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Test coverage improvement

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] Lint clean (`ruff check src/ tests/`)
- [ ] Format clean (`ruff format --check src/ tests/`)
- [ ] Type check clean (`mypy src/qubitos/ --ignore-missing-imports --exclude proto_convert`)
- [ ] New code has tests
- [ ] Physics implementations cite source papers (DOI/arXiv)
- [ ] Docstrings follow Google style
- [ ] CHANGELOG.txt updated (if user-facing)
